children.heading: Exception for certain natural gas projects
children.label: a Exception for certain natural gas projects

children.text: for the development of natural gas and the construction and operation of a pipeline to transport natural gas from Azerbaijan to Turkey and Europe;

that provides to Turkey and countries in Europe energy security and energy independence from the Government of the Russian Federation and other governments with jurisdiction over persons subject to sanctions imposed under this Act or amendments made by this Act; and

that was initiated before , pursuant to a production-sharing agreement, or an ancillary agreement necessary to further a production-sharing agreement, entered into with, or a license granted by, the government of a country other than Iran before .August 10, 2012August 10, 2012

children.label: A
children.text: the percentage of the equity interest in the project held by or on behalf of an entity described in paragraph (2) has increased relative to the percentage of the equity interest in the project held by or on behalf of such an entity on ; orJanuary 1, 2002

children.label: B
children.text: an entity described in paragraph (2) has assumed an operational role in the project.

children.label: i
children.text: owned or controlled by the Government of Iran or identified under section 560.304 of title 31, Code of Federal Regulations (relating to the definition of the Government of Iran); or

children.label: ii
children.text: organized under the laws of Iran or with the participation or approval of the Government of Iran;

children.label: B
children.text: an entity owned or controlled by an entity described in subparagraph (A); or

children.label: C
children.text: a successor entity to an entity described in subparagraph (A).
